title: Claude Code Skill Frontmatter
description: Schema for validating YAML frontmatter in SKILL.md files

name.description: Skill identifier (kebab-case). Optional — if omitted, the directory name is used as the skill name.

description.description: When and why to use this skill - used for Claude's skill discovery. Strongly recommended; no hard character limit in official docs but keep it focused.
examples: Guide for creating Claude Code skills with YAML frontmatter, progressive disclosure, and best practices. Use when creating new skills, writing SKILL.md files, or learning skill development patterns.

argument-hint.description: Hint text shown in argument completion, describing what arguments the skill accepts when invoked

allowed-tools.description: List of tools this skill is permitted to use. Accepts known tool names or MCP tool patterns (mcp__<server>__<tool>).

disable-model-invocation.description: When true, prevents Claude from automatically invoking this skill based on context. Use for template-only skills or skills that should only be explicitly invoked. This is the inverse of the non-standard 'auto-invoke' field.

user-invocable.description: Whether the user can explicitly invoke this skill via a slash command. When false, the skill is only available for model-initiated use.

model.description: The model to use when this skill is invoked. Allows directing lightweight tasks to faster models and complex tasks to more capable models.

context.description: Set to 'fork' to run in a forked subagent context.

agent.description: The agent name to delegate skill execution to. Specifies a named agent configuration for skill execution.

hooks.description: Hook configurations for the skill. Defines matchers and handlers to run at specific lifecycle events during skill execution. Uses the same event names and handler schema as hooks.json.

created.description: [Extension] Date the skill was created (ISO 8601 date format)

last_updated.description: [Extension] Date the skill was last modified (ISO 8601 date format)

auto-invoke.description: [Extension] [Deprecated: use 'disable-model-invocation' instead, which is the official inverse boolean] Whether Claude should automatically invoke this skill when appropriate

categories.description: [Extension] Categories for organizing and discovering the skill

tags.description: [Extension] Tags for skill discovery and search

dependencies.description: [Extension] Other skills this skill depends on or references

examples.name: authoring-skills
examples.description: Guide for creating Claude Code skills with YAML frontmatter, progressive disclosure, and best practices. Use when creating new skills, writing SKILL.md files, or learning skill development patterns.

examples.name: analyzing-code
examples.description: Skill for analyzing code patterns and architecture. Use when reviewing code quality, identifying issues, or understanding code structure.

examples.name: issue-template
examples.description: GitHub issue template for bug reports. Use when creating a new bug report or feature request.

examples.name: architecture-review
examples.description: Deep architectural analysis skill. Use when reviewing system design, evaluating trade-offs, or producing architecture decision records.
